title: CMMC 2.0 Level 2 compliance requirements research
description: Deep-dive research on CMMC 2.0 Level 2 (110 NIST SP 800-171 controls). Map the full control family structure, identify the most common gaps small contractors face, catalog competitor solutions (preVeil, CMMC Primer, Exostar), and produce a prioritized feature matrix for the MVP. Audience: small defense contractors (1-50 employees). Output: products/product-0603/research/cmmc_research_report.md
